---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for RestLib
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing.
Example: "I need to filter by date ranges but the current operators don't support ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Include API examples if possible:

```csharp
// Example of the desired API
config.AllowSomething(p => p.Property);
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references (e.g., related ADRs, similar features in other libraries).
